arts.ttl: Bristol City midfielder Tommy Backwell set for Cheltenham Town loan move
arts.sum: Backwell has senior experience in non-league football from youth loans with Hallen and Yate Town, along with a brief spell at National League South club Bath City. Cheltenham Town are set to sign attacking midfielder Tommy Backwell from Bristol City, Gloucestershire Live understands.

Harrogate come into this fixture having won just one of their last nine games, they did win their last league game against Barrow. Cheltenham's 2-1 win over Colchester last time out made it four wins...

arts.ttl: Preview: Harrogate Town vs. Cheltenham Town - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Friday's League Two clash between Harrogate Town and Cheltenham Town, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
